footer.tagline: Long-stay country guides for slow nomads.
footer.affiliateNotice: Some links on this site are affiliate links. We may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you.

home.heroTitle: Country guides for nomads who stay a while.
home.heroSubtitle: Visa, cost of living, internet, weather and tax basics for the places that welcome long-stay travelers.
home.pitchFinderText: 5-question quiz across 100+ cities. Budget, work, climate, visa — get your top 9 matches in 60 seconds.
home.pitchFilterText: Cost index, Mbps, safety, region, nomad score. Sliders and chips. Sort by what actually matters for your trip.
home.pitchJobsText: Slate Remote — our sister site — aggregates every remote role from every major board. One search, all sources, refreshed daily.
home.ctaSubtitle: Every page on Slowmadly is researched for nomads who pick a place and settle in for a month, a season, or a year.

detail.haveVisaNeedJob: Have the visa, need the job?
detail.noMatch: No match. Try loosening one of the constraints.

meta.finderTitle: Find your best place to work remotely — quiz
meta.finderDesc: Tell us your budget, internet needs and climate preference. We rank 100+ nomad cities and match you with the best basecamp.
meta.countriesDesc: Filter every digital-nomad-friendly country by cost, internet, safety, region and visa pathway. Find your next basecamp in 30 seconds.
meta.citiesDesc: Filter 100+ digital nomad cities by cost, internet, safety, region and nomad score. Find your basecamp in 30 seconds.
meta.visasDesc: 35+ digital nomad and freelance visas compared: income, duration, tax, family eligibility.
meta.guidesDesc: In-depth guides on nomad visas, cost of living, tax residency, eSIM, banking and city basecamps.
meta.bestDesc: Browse the 50+ digital nomad countries by what matters to you: warm, affordable, fast WiFi, Schengen, English-speaking, tax-friendly.
meta.compareTitle: Compare digital nomad destinations side by side
meta.compareDesc: 25+ head-to-head comparisons of digital nomad countries and cities: cost, visa, vibe, internet.
meta.regionsDesc: Browse 50+ digital nomad countries across Europe, SEA, Latin America, East Asia, Caucasus, Africa & the Caribbean.
meta.glossaryTitle: Digital nomad glossary 2026: visa, tax and remote work terms
meta.glossaryDesc: All the visa, tax residency, remote work and immigration terms a digital nomad needs to understand in 2026.
meta.themesDesc: Find cities by lifestyle theme: surf, food, coworking, yoga, family, nightlife, nature, vegan, LGBTQ+ friendly, beach, mountain.
meta.coworkingTitle: Best coworking spaces by city for digital nomads (2026)
meta.coworkingDesc: Top coworking spaces in 20+ nomad cities (Lisbon, Bali, Bangkok, Berlin, Mexico City…) with hot-desk monthly rates and community notes.
meta.costOfLivingTitle: Cost of living for digital nomads (2026)
meta.costOfLivingDesc: Detailed monthly cost breakdowns for 75+ digital nomad cities in 2026: rent, food, coworking, transport.
meta.forTitle: Best digital nomad cities by job role (2026)
meta.forDesc: Best cities for developers, designers, product managers, marketers, data scientists, writers, founders and consultants in 2026.
meta.seasonalTitle: Best digital nomad destinations by season (2026)
meta.seasonalDesc: Where to nomad in winter, spring, summer or autumn 2026. Cities and countries optimised for each season.
meta.searchDesc: Search 3700+ pages on Slowmadly: countries, nomad cities, digital nomad visas, comparisons, lifestyle themes and long-form guides.
meta.countryDescTpl: {name} for nomads: digital nomad visa, cost of living index {costIndex}/100, {internetMbps} Mbps avg internet, safety, weather, top cities and what it actually costs to live there.
meta.cityDescTpl: {name} for nomads (score {nomadScore}/10): rent, {internetMbps} Mbps internet, safety, weather, top neighborhoods, coworking, monthly budget and visa pathways.
meta.visaDescTpl: Apply for the {name} in {country}. {income}, {months} months duration, {days}-day processing. Tax and family rules covered.
